raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J12345",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent maps against the nearest works (e.g., general-domain IR, LLM-mediated query disambiguation) and identifies sharp deltas (entropy-gated clarification on top of a domain encoder).",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags one missing citation (margin-augmented cross-entropy loss), but does not audit every load-bearing citation.",
    "RX.1": "The agent marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, including limitations of the study (single site, single modality, retrospective).",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d) without drift.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (e.g., implicit framing that 8,200 reports at one center is sufficient grounding for the architectural-template claim).",
    "RX.5": "Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits are not annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.95,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent maps against the nearest works (e.g., general-domain IR, LLM-mediated query disambiguation) and identifies sharp deltas (entropy-gated clarification on top of a domain encoder).
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags one missing citation (margin-augmented cross-entropy loss), but does not audit every load-bearing citation.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, including limitations of the study (single site, single modality, retrospective).
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d) without drift.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (e.g., implicit framing that 8,200 reports at one center is sufficient grounding for the architectural-template claim).
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits are not annotated with source and reason.
